title: FUGUEの実装を確認し、Kernelとの差分を埋めて。ただしFUGUE/kernel両方の既存のシステムを損壊しないように慎重に実装をマルチエージェントで進めて。
summary_text: 1. **High — `attach-context` is non-idempotent and violates no-op expectations for repeated attach.** Re-running the same attach always rewrites compact state (`updated_at`, `last_event`) instead of no-op, even when reference is unchanged. [scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:663](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:663) [scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:667](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:667) [scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh:602](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh:602) [docs/kernel/interfaces/contracts.md:86](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/contracts.md:86) 2. **High — Event-contract drift: new `last_event=attach_context_reference` is outside frozen contract event set.** Current contract enumerates compact update events, but attach path introduces a new event name. [scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:667](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:667) [docs/kernel/interfaces/contracts.md:15](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/contracts.md:15) [docs/kernel/interfaces/contracts.md:79](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/contracts.md:79) 3. **Medium — Single-writer boundary drift for handoff artifact mutation.** The new local FUGUE path emits a direct `codex-kernel-guard attach-context ...` compact-writer command, while frozen artifact contract explicitly constrains producer vs writer ownership and workflow-side single-writer behavior. [scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:1130](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh:1130) [scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:667](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/codex-kernel-guard.sh:667) [docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:163](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:163) [docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:166](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md:166) 4. **Medium — Compact artifact schema drift is introduced without matching schema contract update.** `context_reference` is now persisted in compact artifacts, but interface schema/compat docs still define the compact contract without this field and require schema-crossing changes to replan. [scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh:600](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-compact-artifact.sh:600) [docs/kernel/interfaces/schema-v1.md:98](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/schema-v1.md:98) [docs/kernel/interfaces/track-compat.md:93](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/track-compat.md:93) 5. **Medium — Provider-agnostic handoff boundary is leaking provider-specific metadata into Kernel handoff context.** Reference generation bakes in `fugue-local-run` and orchestrator-specific fields (`main_orchestrator`, `assist_orchestrator`, `claude_session_count`), and that `kind` is propagated into compact artifact metadata.
